page_metadata.biotools__summary: Sequence assembly software using traditional and next-gen techonologies. Subsequent analysis of the assembly, including variant discovery, coverage evaluation and consensus annotation is provided through full integration with Lasergene.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Sequence assembly software using traditional and next-gen techonologies. Subsequent analysis of the assembly, including variant discovery, coverage evaluation and consensus annotation is provided through full integration with Lasergene.
